_meta.null_signal_reason: : Weekly bundle contains multiple new I2/I5 developments across Sahel, Russia-Ukraine, Iran, Gaza theatres.
_meta.cycle_disposition_reason: Weekly research carries new confirmed developments including JNIM-FLA Bamako strikes killing Defense Minister, Russia 666-drone Dnipro attack, US-Iran talks collapse, Hamas ceasefire rejection.

lead_signal.headline: JNIM-Tuareg forces strike Mali capital Bamako killing Defense Minister in major Sahel escalation
lead_signal.body: Coordinated JNIM-FLA attacks hit Bamako, Kati, Gao, Kidal on April 25 killing General Sadio Camara. Demonstrates jihadist-ethno-nationalist cooperation reaching capital for first time. Signals Wagner successor Russian Africa Corps failure and Sahel I2 intensity surge.

module_0.title: JNIM-Tuareg forces strike Mali capital Bamako killing Defense Minister in major Sahel escalation
module_0.body: On April 25 coordinated JNIM and FLA attacks targeted Bamako and northern cities killing Defense Minister Sadio Camara. FLA claimed Kidal control after Malian-Russian withdrawal. Represents most significant Sahel escalation 2026 with unusual jihadist-separatist alliance. Watch Russian Africa Corps response and JNIM expansion southwards.

force_posture_events.name: JNIM-FLA Coordinated Offensive
force_posture_events.headline: Multi-city strikes including Bamako kill Defense Minister
force_posture_events.asymmetric: Jihadist-separatist alliance unprecedented; signals Wagner/RAC posture collapse

force_posture_events.headline: Largest single strike on Dnipro kills 9 civilians
